overall.description: A first-person night hike along a dirt trail through a grassy forest area. The path is illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp, revealing tall grass and trees lining the route while the surrounding woods remain in darkness.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail, illuminating the path ahead with a flashlight or headlamp

tall wild grass lining the left side of the trail
tall wild grass lining the right side of the trail
dense line of trees forming the left boundary of the trail
dense line of trees forming the right boundary of the trail
dark night sky visible as a narrow band above the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through a forest at night. A flashlight illuminates the path ahead, revealing tall grass on both sides and tree trunks flanking the route, while the surrounding woods remain in deep darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward progression along a secluded forest trail shrouded in the deep darkness of night. It begins with a narrow dirt path cutting through the woods, where a single beam of light carves a tunnel of visibility through the gloom. As the camera advances, the flashlight reveals the rhythmic passing of tree trunks and the texture of tall grass flanking the route. The scene maintains this focused perspective, pushing deeper into the nocturnal environment while the surrounding forest remains an impenetrable black void.
